EmailTemplate.description: Email to use for RAF leads for an Admiral policy at the second attempt stage.
EmailTemplate.name: RAF Lead (Admiral)_2nd Attempt
EmailTemplate.subject: Requested insurance quote follow up
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
I’ve not been able to reach you since you were referred to us by your friend {!Lead.Referred_By_Account__c}.
It would be useful to know more about your business, so I can understand what cover you might require.
Some key benefits of our package are:
- Up to £2,500 tools and equipment cover included as standard at no extra cost (with in-van cover!) - 24-hour payout on accepted tool theft claims, helping to get Britian’s tradespeople back on the job faster. - Nil excess and no hidden fees on most professions covered, reducing out-of-pocket or unexpected costs. - UK-based in-house specialists, including easy, quick access to brokers, and rapid, responsive claims processing managed by a dedicated claims team. - All core covers in one place, wrapped into a single neat, affordable package attached to one easy payment.
However, it would be good to discuss your requirements to make sure this is the best policy for you. Is there a good time for me to give you a call?
Alternatively, you can contact me on 01242 808 740. Our office is open between the hours of 8:00am-5:30pm, Monday-Friday.
I look forward to hearing from you soon.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
